captures.caption: A field of white stars now scrolls down behind the ship and the wave — drawn straight into screen RAM with the indirect pointer, all drifting at one speed for now.
captures.alt: White asterisk stars scattered across the screen drift steadily downward behind the ship and enemies, wrapping back to the top, while the ship moves left and right.

captures.caption: Three depths at three speeds: bright white stars race down the front, light-grey ones drift slower, and dim grey ones crawl at the back — the screen gains real depth.
captures.alt: Stars at three brightness levels scroll downward at clearly different speeds — bright white fastest, medium grey slower, dim grey slowest — giving an impression of depth behind the gameplay.
